goal: Build an obstacle-avoidance station: 4 cubes from conveyor delivered to bin, but a tall pillar obstacle stands between pick zone and bin. cuRobo must plan around it. Tests planning_obstacles + collision-aware path.
thoughts:
Six obstacle-avoidance specifics for CP-37 (extends CP-01 — adds obstacle prim):
1) Tall obstacle pillar: 10×10×40cm cube at [0, 0, 0.95] (centered between robot at y=0 and bin at y=-0.4). Top z=1.15.
2) Pillar in planning_obstacles. cuRobo plans transit around (over or beside) it.
3) EE_INITIAL_HEIGHT auto > pillar top: max(source_z 0.835, drop_z 0.825) + 0.20 = 1.035m. But pillar top = 1.15m → EE BELOW pillar top during transit. Will collide.
4) FIX: pass end_effector_initial_height=1.30 explicitly to controller, OR raise the bin placement to force higher h1.
5) For v1: explicit h1 override. setup_pick_place_controller(end_effector_initial_height=1.30, ...).
6) Tests cuRobo's collision-aware planning. Without h1 override, controller would plan EE through pillar.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Tall pillar obstacle between pick zone and bin (NOT overlapping robot base)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pillar", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.2, 0.95], scale=[0.05, 0.05, 0.20])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pillar", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Explicit h1 override = pillar top + clearance
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    end_effector_initial_height=1.30,
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Pillar", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-37 tests cuRobo's collision-aware path planning around an explicit obstacle. end_effector_initial_height=1.30 explicit override (vs auto 1.035) ensures EE clears pillar top z=1.15 during transit. Production lesson: when planning_obstacles include tall items, override h1 explicitly.
failure_modes: Without h1 override → EE auto h1=1.035 < pillar top 1.15 → collision during transit. Override h1=1.30 fixes.

Pillar in transit path → cuRobo plans around. Pillar at center xy=(0,0); transit from (0.4, 0.4) to (0, -0.4) sweeps the y-axis line, pillar in way. cuRobo's joint-space planner finds plan over or around.
Pillar too tall (0.40m height pillar) makes h1=1.30 needed, near Franka's vertical reach limit (1.5m at base+0.85). Acceptable.
